title: Weird News
text: A {noun} in {place} was arrested this morning after he was caught {verb ending in -ing} in front of {noun}. {person} had a history of {verb ending in -ing}, but no one-not even his {noun}-ever imagined he'd {verb} with a {noun} stuck in his {body part}. After drinking a {food}, cops followed him to a {place} where he reportedly  {past-tense verb}in the fry machine. Later, a woman from {place} was charged with a similar crime. But rather than {verb}with a {noun}, she {past-tense verb}with a {adjective} dog. Either way, we imagine that after witnessing him {verb ending in -ing} with a {noun} there are probably a whole lot of {plural noun} that are going to need some therapy!
